kill_fact: The board's load-bearing PENDING_HARD catalyst already FIRED AND FAILED: the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter on Jan 30, 2026 (stock -~39%), confirmed by SEC 8-K. The '2026-09-30 hard date' is NOT an FDA decision - it is merely the company's guided NDA RESUBMISSION window (Q3 2026), and NO new PDUFA action date has been assigned. The true approval/CRL decision is two gates out (clean resubmission, then a ~6-month review) and is UNDATED (~Q1-2027 est.). So there is no 105-day dated binary - this is a SOFT_EXTENDED, single-binary, second-attempt FDA bet, not an imminent hard catalyst. The asymmetry is real and the floor is revenue-backed/funded, so the setup survives, but the imminence the board priced is absent.
corrections: (1) catalyst_status PENDING_HARD -> SOFT_EXTENDED: the 2026-09-30 'hard date' is the company's Q3-2026 resubmission GUIDANCE, not an FDA action date; no PDUFA is assigned. (2) The real decision is undated (~Q1-2027 on a post-resubmission Class 2 clock), two gates away. (3) win_prob 0.70 'at a hard date' is unsupportable - there is no clock-dated decision to attach odds to; effective approval probability ~0.55-0.60 must be discounted for resubmission-slip + the extra undated quarters. Floor (~$2.75) is FUNDAMENTAL/revenue-backed (Sympazan/Libervant/PharmFilm royalties + cash less enlarged Oaktree debt), NOT contractual deal cash - breachable on a second CRL or royalty miss.
evidence: SEC 8-K (filed 2026-02-02, event 2026-01-30), Aquestive Therapeutics: FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for Anaphylm (dibutepinephrine) Sublingual Film; deficiencies limited to human factors validation + a single PK study + packaging/labeling, NO CMC/efficacy/comparability concerns; company expects to resubmit 'as early as the third quarter of 2026'. https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001398733/000139873326000005/anaphylmcrlpressrelease2.htm

Aquestive press release / SEC 8-K (2026-03-30): completed in-person Type A meeting with FDA, aligned on PK + human factors study designs, final meeting minutes expected early May 2026, REAFFIRMED Q3-2026 NDA resubmission guidance - no PDUFA action date and no Class-2/6-month decision date stated. https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1398733/000139873326000022/typeameetingpressrelease.htm

Aquestive press release / SEC 8-K (2026-05-12): completed $150M Oaktree debt refinancing - $55M funded at close (repaid prior $45M loan), +$20M available on FDA approval of Anaphylm, +$25M/+$50M later tranches; five-year interest-only, principal due at 2031 maturity. Confirms a funded balance sheet / no near-term forced equity raise, but adds senior debt (equity junior to Oaktree). https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/12/3293012/0/en/aquestive-therapeutics-completes-150-million-debt-refinancing-with-oaktree.html

Aquestive Investor Relations CRL release confirming the Jan-30-2026 CRL and the narrow, fixable deficiency set (human factors + one PK study + packaging; no CMC/efficacy). https://investors.aquestive.com/news-releases/news-release-details/aquestive-therapeutics-announces-fda-issuance-complete-response
